2 years ago I speedrunned HP2 for a few months, and today I came across the video of my PB and remembered that I forgot to submit it at the time. I checked the rules to make sure they hadn't changed and that my run was still valid, and it seems that it is. It's been 2 years now and the runners probably found a ton of new routes and new glitches, so I apologize for the archaic gameplay you are about to watch haha.

My run was already quite mediocre at the time tbh, mainly because of the horrendous chamber I went through, but I had a really fun time speedrunning this game, and looking at my PB 2 years later brings back a lot of great memories.
